data.title: FLSmidth records strong performance in 2025, sets sights on accelerating growth in the next phase. #annualreport
data.description: An increase in the number of COVID-19 cases has been reported in the region, with a total of 1,500 new cases recorded in the past week. The surge in cases has prompted health officials to urge the public to follow safety guidelines, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing. The total number of cases in the region now stands at 10,000, with 500 active cases currently being monitored. The local hospitals are reportedly experiencing a strain on resources due to the rising number of patients requiring treatment. Authorities are considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The public is advised to stay updated on the situation and adhere to any guidelines issued by health officials.

data.title: Nevada files lawsuit against Kalshi after prediction market fails to halt state action; Kalshi seeks federal court for case, claiming compliance with federal commodity laws.
data.description: Kalshi is seeking to move Nevada's lawsuit to federal court, claiming that it is governed solely by federal commodity exchange laws.

data.title: Novartis achieves Phase III primary endpoint in CIndU with remibrutinib, shows higher complete response rates vs placebo at Week 12. Major advancement in treating CIndU.
data.description: In Basel on February 18, 2026, Novartis revealed promising top-line results from the pivotal Phase III RemIND trial of oral remibrutinib in chronic inducible urticaria (CIndU). The study successfully met its primary endpoint for the most common CIndU types - symptomatic dermographism, cold urticaria, and cholinergic urticaria, exhibiting notably higher complete response rates compared to placebo at Week 12. These findings mark a significant progression in CIndU treatment, highlighting the potential of remibrutinib as a pioneering targeted therapy for CIndU, filling a crucial treatment gap.

data.title: XRP may have hit bottom at $1.12: Multiple data points indicate a possible trend reversal. Bulls on standby?
data.description: Various indicators from technical analysis, on-chain metrics, and data from exchange-traded products indicate that $1.12 could be considered the lowest point for XRP in recent times. This raises the question of whether a trend reversal is imminent for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Pump.fun introduces trader cashbacks to address low profits, with few traders breaking even or making money.
data.description: After facing criticism for months that a low number of Pump.fun traders were able to break even, let alone make a profit, the platform has implemented a new rewards model. This change comes as a response to concerns regarding user success rates on the platform.

data.title: BEYOND Developments reveals EVERMORE Masterplan at Marjan Beach, Ras Al Khaimah.
data.description: In the United Arab Emirates, BEYOND Developments has revealed the EVERMORE Masterplan at Marjan Beach in Ras Al Khaimah.

data.title: IMCD reports 2025 EBITA of EUR 498 million, revenue EUR 4,779 million & gross profit EUR 1,194 million.
data.description: IMCD N.V., a global leader in distributing and formulating specialty chemicals and ingredients, revealed its full-year 2025 results in Rotterdam, The Netherlands. The highlights include a revenue of EUR 4,779 million, a 5% increase on a constant currency basis, with gross profit reaching EUR 1,194 million (3% increase on constant currency). Operating EBITA stood at EUR 498 million, showing a 3% decrease on constant currency basis. The company reported an increase in free cash flow. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New ETF filings tap into prediction markets as Wall Street expands its offerings amid rising institutional interest in the U.S. election cycle.
data.description: As the U.S. election cycle garners institutional attention, there is a growing trend of making prediction market exposure available to public investors. This allows individuals to participate in predicting election outcomes and other events through investment vehicles. With significant interest in the elections, more people are turning to these markets to speculate on possible results, indicating a potential shift in how the public engages with political events.

data.title: Arthur Hayes predicts AI job cuts will trigger credit crisis, making central banks print money, propelling Bitcoin to record highs.
data.description: Arthur Hayes is cautioning that the advancement of artificial intelligence could lead to significant job losses, potentially causing a credit crisis. This crisis may prompt central banks to increase money printing, a move that could propel Bitcoin to reach record-breaking highs. Hayes suggests that the combination of AI-related layoffs and increased monetary supply could have drastic implications for the economy, potentially leading to unprecedented levels of Bitcoin valuation.
D.A. Davidson lowers Palo Alto Networks price target to $190 from $210.

data.title: Fiverr reports Q4 & full year 2025 results. Shareholder letter details, available on investor relations website.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) announced its financial performance for Q4 and FY 2025. The company, known for revolutionizing collaboration and work processes globally, shared detailed financial data and insights in its shareholder letter available on investors.fiverr.com. Investors can access comprehensive operating figures and management perspectives in the report.
